speaker: speaker1
text: How many pieces of luggage would you like to check in , sir ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Three bags and a suitcase . This is my luggage to check .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you have any carry-on luggage ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Put your luggage on the scale , please . Oh , your luggage is overweight .

speaker: speaker2
text: How much is the excess baggage part charge ?

speaker: speaker1
text: This is your voucher , and you can get your luggage back on this . Have a good trip !
